property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-24 in;C:\windows\Sun\Java in;C:\windows\system32;C:\windows;C: lutter in\cache\dart-sdk in\;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\windows\system32;C:\windows;C:\windows\System32\Wbem;C:\windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Program Files
odejs\;C:\xampp\php;C:\ProgramData\ComposerSetup in;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-24 in;C:\Program Files\Docker\Dockeresources in;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\apache-maven-3.9.15 in;C:\Users\USER\AppData\Roaming
pm;C:\Users\USER\AppData\Roaming\Composer\vendor in;C:\Users\USER\.bun in;C: lutter in;C:\Users\USER\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop in;C:\ProgramData\USER\GitHubDesktop in;c:\Users\USER\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\debugCommand;c:\Users\USER\.vscode\extensions\vscjava.vscode-java-debug-0.59.0 undled\scripts
oConfigScripts;.
